title: Brook Escapes the Concert
description: On pages 1–4, this part follows Unknown person #1, Brook, Marines, Narrator, Usopp, Zoro, Fake Straw Hat Pirates. The core story beat is brook escapes the concert.
scene: The scene centers on brook escapes the concert, with Unknown person #1, Brook, Marines, Narrator, Usopp, Zoro, Fake Straw Hat Pirates driving the moment.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: The whole place is in a panic!!

dialogue.speaker: Brook
dialogue.text: YohoHo hohoho! Thank you kindly for this... your timing was exquisite!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Indeed - the Marines who burst into the stadium to arrest the soul king...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: We're here on Shakie- Neesan's orders!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...have been set upon by the fans; it's an all-out riot!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The soul king himself appears to have fled the scene!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: My chest is about to burst from nostalgia and anticipation!

dialogue.speaker: Brook
dialogue.text: ...Not that I have a chest to burst in the first place!!! Yoho hoho!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Dammit!!! Filthy traitor!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's right - the famous musician Brook was actually a pirate!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: All right, then - see you there!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Ghah am..

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What's up?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Weren't you listening?!

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: Ehhm... let's see. "Marines"... "coming"...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: "We"... "ship" "run". You get it?

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: What did you take me for, a baby?! Speak in full sentences!!!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: I figured that was the best way to get through to a guy with muscles for brains...

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Right, you're getting sliced up later.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What's all the ruckus over on that island, anyway?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Good question... "That way"... "Noisy"...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Take him out!!

dialogue.speaker: Fake Straw Hat Pirates
dialogue.text: Big Boss!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Looks like we've found one of the culprits already!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Let's start by teaching this man a lesson!! And just so you all know...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Kill him!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What you're about to see happen to this man...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...is the same thing that's going to happen to you if you ever have the nerve to defy me!! So take that as a warning!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Zoro, Sanji! Do you know this guy?

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: thing is, I ran into him earlier...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Hold it right there!!! Pirates!!!

dialogue.speaker: Fake Luffy
dialogue.text: attention "straw hat Luffy" and all his sub- ordinates!!!

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: You are to surrender peacefully!!!

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: We have sealed all the entrances and exits to this place, Grove #46!!! You no longer have

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Any place to run!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Right?

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: Marines!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Huh?! What the hell are you talking about?!

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: Captain!! W... we're surrounded by Marines!!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Don't panic!! You idiots!! What do you think we went out gathering crew members for?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: We even have some worth over 100 million!

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: Hey!! Caribou!! Coribou!! Use that one marine as a shield!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: And Wrench open an exit!!

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: What Marine?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It seems that a lone scout was captured by them...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Damn...!! This is bad.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Booooss!! I'm afraid that's too tall an order.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: you see, this little shithead lied and said he "didn't call the marines!"

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ka-cha...!!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Stop, you idiot!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: It doesn't look like they plan on coming quietly...

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Is it one of your unwritten rules... that it's fine to lie to the bad guys, eh?! Kehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehe

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Well, damn

dialogue.speaker: Caribou
dialogue.text: Caribou, you crazy bastard!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: You just ignored a direct order from your captain...!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Shoot the Pirates down!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: kehihh!!! I smell blood for the spillin!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The Filty Blood of a Buncha Hypocri- Hillites!!

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: Idiot Marines!! Our captain's got a bounty of four hundred million!!! He's straw hat luffy!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Take 'em Dooown!!!

summary: Brook Escapes the Concert. This part advances the crew from their post-timeskip reunion into the undersea route and the first conflicts surrounding Fish-Man Island.
